name: ledger
description: A standard-library-only, concurrency-safe in-memory ledger. Tracks integer (int64, smallest-currency-unit) account balances and supports Deposit, Withdraw, and Transfer(from,to,amount) with overdraft protection. Insufficient funds returns a wrapped sentinel error (ErrInsufficientFunds) detectable via errors.Is; ErrInvalidAmount and ErrSameAccount guard the other edge cases. Helpers: Balance, Total (value-conservation invariant), Accounts. Verified GREEN with gofmt, go build, go vet, go test, and go test -race on go1.25 (declared go 1.23).

maintain.request: Add a transaction-history audit log: every SUCCESSFUL transfer should be recorded as an append-only TxRecord{From, To, Amount}, and the ledger should expose a History() method that returns the records in application order. Failed transfers (overdraft / invalid amount / same account) must not be recorded, and History() must return a defensive copy so callers cannot mutate the ledger's internal log.

review.bug: Transfer no longer acquires l.mu.Lock()/Unlock(), so concurrent calls read and mutate the shared balances map and history slice without synchronization, producing a data race, lost updates, and possibly a fatal concurrent-map-write panic.
keywords: lost update on balances and history
